provenance_notes: NEWLY ESTABLISHED PAIR. V_8.mov was originally conflated with V18.MOV in the scoring pipeline. Forensic fingerprint analysis (identical 45s cut phase, identical throw structure, identical drain outcome) confirmed the earlier 'score_chatgpt_V8_001' (141s/456) and the current Claude 'score_claude_V_8_001' (136s/460) are both evaluations of the same SURG20 wall-mount V_8.mov recording. The GPT-4o file has been relabeled from V8_video to V_8_video.

deltas.agreement_notes: Among the tightest teacher agreements in the V-series. Total FLS delta of 4.0 is comparable to V30 (1.3) and V31 (0.1). Both teachers independently read the same SURG20 wall-mount recording and converged on a ~136-141s completion time and ~456-460 FLS.

needle_load.note: Tight agreement on the quick needle load.

suture_placement.note: GPT-4o stretches placement ~10s later; Claude closes placement at 23s vs GPT-4o at 34.6s.

first_throw.note: Claude keeps first throw open 6.6s longer. Claude's 'first_throw' (23-43s) overlaps with GPT-4o's 'suture_placement' tail (27-34.6s) and early first throw (34.6-48s).

second_throw.note: TIGHTEST phase agreement - both read ~20s on second throw.

third_throw.note: IDENTICAL third throw duration - 28s. Both flag this as the slowest throw.

suture_cut.note: SMOKING GUN - identical 45s cut phase. This was the forensic fingerprint that proved both scores are of the same video.

knot_assessment_alignment.hand_leadership_precision: GPT-4o called hand leadership (right/left/right); Claude marked 'unclear' due to monitor angle but confirmed the alternating pattern. No disagreement.

placement_alignment.note: Minor 0.5mm divergence per mark; both teachers flagged placement confidence as low due to oblique monitor angle.

reconciled.reasoning: Teacher delta is very small (4.0 FLS, 5s). Averaging is appropriate since there is no endpoint-anchoring dispute and both confidence scores are comparable. Reconciled score rounds GPT-4o's 456 and Claude's 460 to 458 at a midpoint time of 138.5s.

cross_station_context: This is the fastest confirmed time at the SURG20 wall-mount station. Demonstrates skill transfer from the V11-V14 RCA lab setup.
